name: RJ's Indoor Golf and Bar
address: 2833 St Andrews Way, Sioux Center, IA 51250
about: RJ's Indoor Golf and Bar is an all-in-one entertainment venue located in Sioux Center, Iowa. The facility combines a driving range with a sports simulator, indoor mini golf, a restaurant and self-pour tap wall, and an event center. It offers a casual environment for both sport and social activities, catering to golfers, families, and groups looking for a multi-faceted entertainment experience. The venue is promoted as NW Iowa's only indoor mini golf facility, featuring professional-grade simulator greens and a full-service bar and restaurant operation.
why_golfers_like_it: Multi-purpose venue offering both serious practice with high-end simulators and casual fun with mini-golf
On-site restaurant and bar provide a convenient all-in-one experience for food and drinks during play
Event center and private party rooms are available for group outings and corporate events

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with a visible menu link

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available, though it mentions 'club rentals' in its amenities list. It's recommended to bring your own clubs or inquire directly with the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers its own restaurant and a self-pour tap wall, which suggests that outside food and drinks are not permitted. The facility provides on-site dining and beverage options.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for a full 18-hole round. The time would likely depend on the number of players in your group and whether you're using the simulators or the mini golf course.

faq.question: Is RJ's Indoor Golf and Bar kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is very kid-friendly. It features an indoor mini golf course and is marketed as a family entertainment destination with multiple activities suitable for children.
